mkdir -p <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs
cp <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/kwok.yaml <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/kwok.yaml
mkdir -p <ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components
podman info ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/podman-info.txt
podman logs kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-etcd ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/etcd.log
podman logs kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-kube-apiserver ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kube-apiserver.log
podman logs kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-kube-controller-manager ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kube-controller-manager.log
podman logs kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-kube-scheduler ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kube-scheduler.log
podman logs kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-kwok-controller ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/kwok-controller.log
podman logs kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-metrics-server ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/metrics-server.log
podman logs kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-prometheus ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/prometheus.log
podman logs kwok-<CLUSTER_NAME>-jaeger ><ROOT_DIR>/workdir/clusters/<CLUSTER_NAME>/export/logs/components/jaeger.log
